steps.title: Substitute x = 9 using the given condition
steps.content: We have $f(x) = 6x + b$ and we're told that $f(9) = 54$. Substitute $x = 9$ into the function: $$f(9) = 6(9) + b = 54 + b$$ Since $f(9) = 54$, we have the equation: $$54 + b = 54$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content: From the equation $54 + b = 54$, subtract 54 from both sides: $$b = 0$$ That is the correct answer.
